zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Pierre de Vendôme I於1200年出生在法國洛易-吉黑波旁_時，他的父親Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme26歲，母親Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau25歲。他於1228年與Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne在法國洛易-吉黑波旁_結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1249年3月25日在塞浦路斯享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Pierre de Vendôme I于1200年出生在法国洛易-吉黑波旁_时，他的父亲Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme26岁，母亲Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau25岁。他于1228年与Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne在法国洛易-吉黑波旁_结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1249年3月25日在塞浦路斯享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Pierre de Vendôme I was born in 1200, in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, France, his father, Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme, was 26 and his mother, Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau, was 25. He married Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne in 1228, in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 25 March 1249, in Cyprus, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Pierre de Vendôme I est né en 1200, à Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne en 1228, à Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1249, à Chypre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Pierre de Vendôme I 1200 in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme 26 und seine Mutter Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau 25. Er hat 1228 in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 25. März 1249 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Zypern.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Pierre de Vendôme I è nato il nel 1200 nel Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, il suo padre, Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne nel 1228, nel Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 25 marzo 1249, nel Cipro, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre-Val de Loi: フランスロイル-エト-チャーベンドoメ
ja.lifeSummary: Comte Pierre de Vendôme Iが1200年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーベンドoメで生まれた時，父Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendômeは26歳，母Marguerite Eglantine de Palluauは25歳であった。1228年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーベンドoメでJeanne Gervaise de Mayenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1249年3月25日にキプロスで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Pierre de Vendôme I(이)가 1200년 프랑스 로이-트-처 븐드o에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1228년 프랑스 로이-트-처 븐드o에서 Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1249년 3월 25일 키프로스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Pierre de Vendôme I nasceu em 1200, em Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne em 1228, em Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1249, em Chipre, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Pierre de Vendôme I родился в 1200 г. в местности вендoм, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne в 1228 г. в местности вендoм, лоир-ет-чир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 25 марта 1249 г. в местности Кипр в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Pierre de Vendôme I nació en 1200, en Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, su papá, Jean IV de Montoire Comte de Vendôme, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Marguerite Eglantine de Palluau, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne en 1228, en Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1249, en Chipre, a la edad de 49 años.
